# Paper-ready tables (mcmc schedule)

*Generated by `make_plots.py:write_paper_tables` from `plots`. Cells show `mean ± 1.96·SE (n=k)` when n≥3, `median (n=k)` for 2≤n<3, bare value for n=1, em-dash for n=0.*
